items.title: Apple's Record-Breaking Q4, Tim Cook's Bold Prediction And More: This Week In Appleverse
items.description: Apple breaks records in Q4 and ad revenue, Samsung teases iPhone users, and Jamie Dimon echoes Steve Jobs on office meetings.

items.title: The 3 Things That Could Derail This Rally
items.description: The market rallied in October, with NASDAQ up 4.7%, as AI-driven gains pushed equities to extreme valuations historically. Check out what could trigger a correction.
